message:
feat(wal): add operational telemetry counters to WalEngine [ft-3kxe.16]

Add WalTelemetry with 6 counters (appends, checkpoints, compactions,
entries_compacted, truncations, entries_truncated) wired into append(),
checkpoint(), compact(), and truncate_after(). Plain u64 since methods
take &mut self.

Includes proptest_wal_engine_telemetry.rs with 11 unit tests and 5
property tests covering call counting, monotonicity, compaction bounds,
and serde roundtrip.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
